description_en: Rotterdam may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 130 halal restaurants and 20 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Rotterdam, the Netherlands, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Rotterdam: 133 halal restaurants listed, 20 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.9/5.
